title: OCS/GCS qconf user schema
description: Schema describing the JSON produced and consumed by qconf -fmt json -suser / -Muser: a user definition.

oticket.description: Override tickets assigned to the user.

fshare.description: Functional share assigned to the user.

delete_time.description: Local ISO date-time (YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss) after which an automatically created user is deleted, or the empty string if unset.

default_project.description: Default project for the user, or the empty string if unset (equivalent to NONE).
